meaning: n.[生]不染色细胞adj.不易染色的,难染的
examples: Objective: To discuss the diagnosis and treatment of renal chromophobe cell carcinoma (RCCC).
According to these, this tumor can be differentiated from granular renal cell carcinoma, mixed renal cell carcinoma and chromophobe renal cell carcinoma.
Chromophobe renal cell carcinoma is a kind of relatively rare renal cancer, and it is about 4%-5% among all the renal cancer in the corresponding period.
